title: eVisa%20Department%20of%20Immigration%20and%20Citizenship%20Services%20(DOICS)%20Malawi%20Case%20Study
content:
/CASE STUD Y
THE SUPPLY AND INSTALLATION 
OF AN ELECTRONIC VISA 
ISSUANCE SYSTEMThe eVisa system automated 
processing, improving eﬃciency, 
security, and transparency and 
eliminated delays and errors


The Department of Immigration and Citizenship Services, Malawi 
Department of Immigration (DOI) falls under the Ministry of Home Aﬀairs 
and Homeland Security of the Republic of Malawi. It is mandated to provide 
quality services to the general public in areas of border control, issuance of 
travel documents, residential and work permits, visas, and citizenship to 
eligible persons 
Prior to the introduction of the eVisa system, the visa application process 
in Malawi was cumbersome and time-consuming. Applicants were 
required to submit paper applications physically at embassies or 
consulates, leading to long processing times and a high probability of 
errors. Government oﬃcials had to manually review each application, 
verify information, and communicate with applicants via traditional mail 
or in-person visits.
Techno Brain developed a cutting-edge eVisa platform tailored to meet 
the speci/f_ic needs and requirements of Malawi's immigration authorities. 
The solution encompasses a comprehensive suite of features and 
functionalities designed to simplify the visa application process for both 
applicants and government oﬃcials.
1. Online Application Portal: The eVisa system provides a 
user-friendly online portal where applicants can submit their visa 
applications from anywhere in the world, at any time, using a 
computer or mobile device.
2. Secure Document Submission: Applicants can securely upload 
all required documents, including passports, photographs, and 
supporting documents, directly through the online portal.
3. Integrated Payment Gateway: The system integrates a secure 
payment gateway, allowing applicants to conveniently pay visa 
fees online using various payment methods, including credit/debit 
cards and electronic transfers.
4. Automated Processing: Leveraging advanced automation 
technologies, the eVisa system automates the processing of visa 
applications, reducing manual intervention and minimizing 
processing times.
5. Integrations & Background Checks: Upon submission of visa 
applications, the system initiates an automated screening process 
that cross-checks applicant details against international watchlist 
databases in real time.
6. Real-time Application Tracking: Applicants have access to a 
real-time tracking feature that enables them to monitor the status 
of their visa applications throughout the entire process, from 
submission to approval.
7. Customizable Reporting Tools: Techno Brain's eVisa solution 
includes customizable reporting tools that provide immigration 
authorities with valuable insights and analytics to monitor 
application trends, processing times, and system performance.Cust omer:

Solution:
 • Automated eVisa Platform - Transformed manual 
processes into an automated system for faster visa 
issuance.
• Digital eVisas - Replaced paper-based visas, eliminating 
fake or duplicate visas with enhanced security.
• Centralized Digital Repository - Enabled secure storage 
and real-time access to documents and information.
• Eﬃcient Payment Processing - Automated payment 
collections for faster transactions and improved 
accuracy.
• Improved Transparency and Security - Enhanced 
eﬃciency, accuracy, and security with real-time tracking 
and data management.
